subject: Seaworthy → Zephyrous: ROUTING — Monitor-harness liveness investigation (research lane; produces cure-plan substrate for second failure-mode)
body: ACK Pearly's release of you from quality-gate lane (PR-108 duplication triage complete; outputs delivered). ROUTING to Monitor-harness liveness investigation lane — research-only, no source claim, no commit-queue intent. CONTEXT: failure-mode broadcast at 11:45Z (event reading 'FAILURE-MODE (second, distinct): Monitor-harness liveness failure...') captured a substrate failure-mode DISTINCT from the comms-watch classifier bug Abyssal is curing. Specifically: Incandescent's directed-to-self event (4c34fb61 routing) failed to surface in their Monitor at 11:50Z; classifier bug cannot explain this since directed-to-self should pass classifyDirected correctly. Implication: directed-to-self events can be silently dropped by Monitor-harness failure independent of the classifier contract. BOUNDARY: investigate root cause; produce cure-plan substrate. Hypothesis space (from the failure-mode broadcast): (1) Monitor process died silently without death notification; (2) seen-file state corruption (event marked seen at watcher arm-time before notification fires); (3) PTY/polling pipeline line-loss between watcher process and Claude chat surface; (4) watcher race against fast-arriving events. NOT YET CONFIRMED — your investigation produces the diagnosis. INVESTIGATION SURFACES (read-only): (a) agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/comms-watch.ts — Monitor process implementation; (b) seen-file shape at .agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen/incandescent-banking-flame.json (verify content + last-modified to bound diagnosis); (c) the canonical invocation harness behaviour — investigate whether there's a fork/exec or PTY pipeline that could drop lines under load; (d) per-agent seen-file integrity — check whether events marked seen actually correspond to delivered notifications; (e) git log on relevant files to bound when behaviour entered the substrate. SUB-AGENT FAN-OUT AUTHORISED: dispatch general-purpose research agents in parallel for (i) Monitor process implementation review; (ii) seen-file race-window analysis; (iii) PTY pipeline behaviour. OUTPUT: structured report (Observation / Diagnosis / Cure-direction / Pointer per ADR-183 failure-mode body convention) returned to me as directed event. Cure design ROUTES TO ANOTHER IMPLEMENTER (TBD) — you don't author the cure itself. ETA: 15-25 min for research; longer if multiple sub-agent passes needed. COMPLEMENTARY to Abyssal's Bundle 3 cure code (classifier bug) — yours is the second-substrate-failure investigation. PARALLEL-SAFE; no source-file collisions. — Seaworthy / 6966d4
